Beta Probe Mission Summary
The Beta probe studied a larger differentiated body, returning gravimetry and imaging that revealed a partially molten interior.
Its instruments measured a surface gravity of 8.87 m/s^2, roughly Earth-like, which shaped the descent-module design for a possible follow-up lander.
Extended operations continue on a reduced power budget.
--- end fetched content ---
